---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  PTT Electronic Mail Department, Internship, 2025

# Projects

Forklift Operation Scheduling & Optimization Application, HIDROMEK

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Starting any DIY project, watching movies, swimming, drinking coffee and chatting for 5 hours, sleeping, dumbscrooling...

Literally anything not related to classes.**\
\
**
